app.title: Launch HN: Relvy (YC F24) – On-call runbooks, automated
app.author: behat
proposed_tests: Install Relvy and configure an on-call runbook
Test automated notifications with a sample event
Compare Relvy with existing on-call tools
Integrate Relvy with a CI/CD pipeline
